title: Monsoon Jammy Egyptian Sea Bass Bake
description:
A flavorful, springy sea bass dish from Egypt, inspired by the monsoon season, featuring a jammy glaze, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

This recipe is a unique twist on traditional Egyptian cuisine, with the addition of a sweet and sticky glaze, making it a delightful and satisfying meal for any occasion.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil, leaving enough room for the fish to fit in a single layer.
Season the sea bass fillets with cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Place the fish on the prepared baking sheet, skin side down (if it has skin).
Mix the honey, lime juice, and grated ginger in a small bowl until well combined.
Brush the honey glaze evenly over the fish, making sure to coat all surfaces.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork and the glaze is caramelized.
Remove the fish from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley for garnish.
